can-diag.description: CAN bus diagnostics via NDR — v3 with correct devctl codes (class=5, cmd=7/8 from NavigationNdrInfo disassembly). Probes devctl format, scans ~25 ECU module addresses, reads fault codes, module info, and live sensor data. READ-ONLY — no writes to vehicle systems.

can-scanner.description: CAN bus / namespace address scanner - discovers what vehicle data is available via GEM key-value polling on your specific MMI3G system

diag-tool.description: UDS diagnostic scanner for VAG modules — simulated transport + full UDS client (alpha). Live mode requires external VAG-COM interface (VCDS HEX, VNCI 6154a). Installed as a Java JAR artifact; no GEM screens.

dns-refresh-probe.description: One-shot network diagnostic that snapshots route/DNS state, rewrites /etc/resolv.conf to a better DNS candidate, and reruns connectivity checks.

game-loader.description: Java game launcher for MMI3G — run games from SD card on the J9 JVM. Use SD slot 2 as your game library!

gauges-dashboard.description: Live vehicle telemetry dashboard - battery voltage, GPS status, system info with data logging to SD card

gem-activator.description: Enable/disable the Green Engineering Menu from SD card — creates /HBpersistence/DBGModeActive. No VCDS needed!

gemmi-dump.description: Extract GEMMI (Google Earth) binaries and config from HDD for offline analysis — needed for auth bypass patching

google-earth.description: Google Earth satellite imagery restoration — CONFIRMED WORKING. On-car proxy serves dbRoot + auth locally, forwards tiles to kh.google.com via plain HTTP. No PC required.

google-earth-gemmi-wrappers.description: Install legacy /scripts/GEMMI control-script wrappers so the OEM GoogleEarth GEM screen can call the donor GEMMI runtime already deployed under /mnt/nav/gemmi/.

google-earth-p0824-deploy.description: Deploy the bundled EU VW P0824 GEMMI donor payload to /mnt/nav/gemmi with on-car backup and minimal drivers.ini auth-bypass patching. SD-card only; does not modify lsd.jxe or firmware.

google-earth-p0824-restore.description: Restore /mnt/nav/gemmi to the pre-deploy state saved by google-earth-p0824-deploy. SD-card only; does not touch firmware.

jvm-extract.description: Extract J9 JVM runtime, UI framework JARs, and application config for offline reverse engineering — the first step toward custom MMI menu entries

long-coding.description: Display current long-coding / adaptation values for each configurable MMI feature. Read-only display module — for safe editing use VCDS or ODIS.

lte-setup.description: Provision MMI3G+ for LTE mobile data via USB Ethernet adapter — replaces defunct internal 3G modem with external LTE router

map-parser.description: Extract and analyze navigation database config — reads nav DB version, map regions, configured paths, and FSC activation state. Read-only.

nav-unblocker.description: Bypass navigation database activation check - uses DrGER2's improved manage_cd.sh patch method (Keldo's discovery)

password-finder.description: Dump stored Wi-Fi hotspot passwords, Audi Connect credentials, and other stored secrets from the MMI's persistence partitions. Read-only — changes nothing on the unit.

per3-reader.description: Read per3 / DSI persistence values from shell scripts. Ships an OSGi bundle that installs into the DSITracer.jar slot on /mnt/efs-system/lsd/ — on MMI boot, the bundle registers as a DSIPersistenceListener and serves synchronous reads through a file-based trigger mechanism. Answers the long-standing 'how do I read per3 addresses without writing a Java GEM screen' question.

per3-writer.description: Write DSI persistence values from shell scripts via OSGi bundle. Enables GEM activation, coding changes, and feature configuration entirely from SD card — no VCDS/ODIS needed.

persistence-dump.description: Dumps persistence state (HBpersistence, efs-persist, shmem, coding) to SD card for offline analysis — use before/after VCDS changes to find exact byte locations

region-audit.description: Read-only region and VZE/TSR audit. Shows live region-related persistence values in GEM and writes a structured audit report to SD card.

splash-screen.description: Custom boot splash screen installer - upload any image, auto-formatted to 800x480 PNG via the desktop app

system-info.description: Comprehensive system diagnostic — gathers identity, activations, credentials, storage, network, persistence state, and backs up key files to SD card. Single pass, no flash writes.

variant-dump.description: MMI identification + configuration dumper — captures train name, MU software version, MU variant, HMI region, kernel info, HDD/partition layout, nav database state, FSC status, persistence file inventory, and LVM unblocker status. Mirrors DrGER2's mmi3ginfo3 approach. Read-only, writes a text report to SD card.

gemmi_assets.note: Downloaded from GitHub Release assets (not in git repo). Only fetched when google-earth module is selected.
